title: AI That’s Too Dangerous For You? What we learned from S.A.T.A.N
summary: IBM Technology explores how AI detects zero-day vulnerabilities faster than manual methods, reshaping cybersecurity defense strategies. The video examines AI-driven vulnerability scanning and DevSecOps integration as mechanisms to improve system safety.
writeup: IBM Technology examines how AI detects zero-day vulnerabilities faster than manual methods, and what that shift means for cybersecurity defense. The video covers AI-driven vulnerability scanning and its integration into DevSecOps workflows as a way to improve system safety. The central takeaway: AI compresses the time needed to surface unknown flaws, and folding that scanning into the development pipeline turns vulnerability detection into a continuous part of the build process rather than a separate, after-the-fact step.
